Pick the category, then complete the service or purchase form. Matches Samsara / Maintenance asset groups.

Add to shop queue

Track units through internal, external, roadside, or parts-purchase queues. Status and bottlenecks are saved in the ERP.

Full-window form (QuickBooks-style). Close when you need the fleet tabs underneath.

Past estimated time — bottleneck

Pick a reason so we can see delays (parts, queue, payment, etc.).
⎔Loads
Maintenance
Groups above refresh when you switch modules. renderErpModuleSidebar(name) fills #erpModuleSidebarInner with stacked erpSbGroup() accordions (maintenance, dashboard, fuel, …). Lists & catalogs reuses erpSbAdmin() + upload/settings shortcuts.
Connections
QuickBooks: checking connection…
Samsara: waiting for first refresh…
Last refresh: waiting…
Create
+ New forms load in the scrollable area below; this line stays pinned. openErpDrawer() sets titles and replaces #erpDrawerBody innerHTML. openAddNewDrawer() builds vendor/item/account markup (items also fill income/expense <select>s). closeErpDrawer() toggles chrome only; body clears on the next open.
401 + authRequired → red strip above when needed; loadAll() hides it after a good refresh. j() paints #authBanner on 401 so users can open Settings. loadAll() clears it (textContent + hidden) after a successful refresh.
Sticky QBO banner — posting/connection issues from the sync poll; Hide × dismisses until the alert set changes. renderQboSyncAlerts() fills #qboSyncAlertBar (degraded/empty/rows). Hide × → dismissQboSyncAlertBar() (hidden, cleared innerHTML, session fingerprint so repeats stay dismissed).
Maintenance
IH 35 Transportation LLC
Picker list below the field. globalSearchRender() + globalSearchCollect() scan vendors, units, loads, bills, WOs — rebuild #globalSearchMenu with .qb-picker-item rows (escaped labels), hide when empty, stub when no hits. Arrows move qb-picker-item-active; Enter runs the row callback.
Tip: left rail, search, and + New. Left icon rail switches modules. Search covers vendors, units, loads, bills, WOs. + New opens the three-column menu (expenses, bills, WOs, settlement, fuel, shortcuts).
Expenses & bills
Standard
Maintenance & fuel
Drivers
Services
More
Other

Diesel planner, relay pricing, and fuel history

Work orders, fleet table, R&M status, shop / location, and service records

Samsara HOS, drivers, and assignments

Live map, assets, Shop & maintenance (queues and alerts), and Samsara data

Accounting

Expenses, bills, and QuickBooks sync

Reports is on the ≡ icon — Home stays day-to-day.

System Summary
Live ERP + Samsara after Refresh (loads, maint, fuel). Open each workspace for detail.
Fleet counts below refresh with Refresh on Home — title ? for ERP + Samsara context. renderDashboardHome() builds five .record-card rows from vehiclesByCategory() (Trucks, Refrigerated Vans, Flatbeds, Dry Vans, Company Vehicles) and replaces #dashboardSummaryCards innerHTML with those counts only.
Sync Summary
Same QBO catalog view as Accounting; counts follow list sync. Posting health: Reports → ERP ↔ QBO sync.
Catalog counts mirror Accounting list sync — title ? for where to drill in. renderDashboardHome() replaces #dashboardQboSummary innerHTML with line-broken counts: cacheVendors(), erp.qboCache customers/classes/employees, cacheItems(), cacheAccounts(), erp.apTransactions length, erp.qboBillPaymentLog length, and tireAlerts length.
No data yet.
Fuel & route planning
Embedded /fuel.html?embed=1 — same planner as full page, no duplicate top nav. Open full screen
In violation Nearing violation
Live Samsara duties: hide off-duty without truck; keep off-duty with truck. Token: Read ELD Compliance Settings (US).

HOS: chips, search, Show; ? = duty rules + token scopes.

Tags ▾

Search (right); tags when Samsara sends them.

Attributes ▾

Duty, vehicle, timers, violations — live Samsara.

Duty status ▾

Show = relevant / active / off-duty / all.

Violations ▾

Violations tint rows (legend above).

Active drivers ▾

Same as Show → Active duties only.

Vehicle assignment ▾

Relevant hides off-duty + no truck; other modes show full window.

board.hos grid — search + Show; read-only mirror. renderSafetyHos(): normalizeHosClock → applySafetyHosDutyMode (Show) → paged #safetyHosBody; safetyHosPager + #safetyHosMeta. Read-only — refresh board if stale.
Driver Duty Vehicle Break in Drive left Shift left Cycle left Violations
Active / in service lists Active = on duty (not off duty or sleeper). In service now = driving, on duty, or yard move (Samsara HOS).
Tags ▾

Use the HOS tab search to narrow tags when enabled.

Attributes ▾

Duty and vehicle columns follow the live Samsara clock.

List filter + same normalized board.hos window as HOS clocks. renderSafetyActivePanels(): applySafetyHosDutyMode + #safetyActiveDutyFilter → active vs in-service → paged #safetyActiveBody / #safetyInServiceBody + pagers + meta rows. Read-only.
Active drivers On duty (not off duty or sleeper). Same Samsara window as HOS clocks + List filter above.
DriverDutyVehicle
In service now Driving, yard move, or on duty with vehicle — subset of Active. Tab ? has full duty defs.
DriverDutyVehicle
Assignments Samsara driver ↔ vehicle assignments for the loaded board window.
Tags ▾

Search filters the assignment grid.

Attributes ▾

Rows reflect the current Samsara assignment window.

board.assignments — search + Show filter here; pager slices the result. renderSafetyAssignments() → #safetyAssignBody from board.assignments. Active = overlaps now (assignmentIsActiveNow); Inactive = rest. Pager after filters; #safetyAssignMeta = counts. Read-only.
VehicleDriverStartEnd
Fleet snapshot Headline counts use the same asset filters as Maintenance and Fuel.
Three headline counts below — refreshes with the board / opening this tab (no table pager). renderSafetyFleet() → #safetyFleetSummary: tracked vehicles.length, Samsara board.vehicles, board.hos lengths. After loadAll() or opening tab. Read-only.
—
Driver files Local compliance fields: CDL, med card, drug test, hire date, notes — not QuickBooks vendor PII.
Tags ▾

Search narrows the driver compliance table.

Attributes ▾

Dates and notes are stored in this app (not QuickBooks).

Rebuilds on search, Show, or page change; unsaved edits stay in memory per driver until Save (or clear fields). renderDriverFiles() → paged #driverFilesBody. Draft per driver until Save → POST /api/safety/driver-profiles; response refreshes + clears draft. #driverFilesMeta = counts.
Driver CDL # CDL exp Med exp Drug exp Hire Notes

Fleet
Fleet chips scope unit list, fleet table, and WO column — ERP categories only (not Samsara). renderMaintenanceCategoryChips() → #maintActionFleetPills pills. setAssetCategory() updates activeAssetCategory, re-renders renderMaintenanceUnitList(), may clear selectedUnit if out of category, then renderSelectedUnit() + renderMaintenanceTable(). Missing strip → same markup on off-screen #assetCategoryChips.
QBO posting hint — updates when sync alerts change. renderMaintAsideQbIssues() → #maintTopQboIssuesInd (severity dot + short status; optional View → #qboSyncAlertBar). #maintAsideQbIssues gets the same HTML for focus routing.
Find unit
Filter by service
Units
Pick a unit to load the WO form. Find unit, service filter, and Maintenance Table narrow rows. ▼ collapses the column.
Rows follow Find unit + active Fleet by type; past-due / due-soon badges use matching dashboard rows per unit. renderMaintenanceUnitList(): #maintenanceUnitSearch + vehiclesByCategory()[activeAssetCategory] → #maintenanceUnitList .list-row cards. selectUnit() highlights row + refreshes WO form, Maintenance Table, AP unit field. No network by itself.
Select a unit from the list to create or view a work order.
Live unit header — full swap on unit change. Fuel / PM strip below uses its own fields, not this card. renderSelectedUnit(): row in vehicles → show #maintWoFormArea, fill #maintAssetHeaderCard (name, YMM, status from Lists → Operational, VIN/plate/odo, Edit status), rebuild #maintAssetStatusPanelBody, clear #selectedUnitInfo, textContent on #maintUnitSummaryStrip, then renderUnitHistory(), syncMaintWorkOrderHeader(), renderMaintAsideWoSummary(). No unit → placeholder.
Select a unit from the list.
Operational status Codes from Lists → Operational + saved WOs. Done closes the sheet only — does not discard the WO.
Save status / Save roster hit the server; Done only closes. renderSelectedUnit() → #maintAssetStatusPanelBody (picker, note, active/retired row). saveAssetStatus() → POST /api/maintenance/asset-status (unit, status, note). saveAssetFleetActive() → POST /api/maintenance/asset-active (active + erpWriteHeaders() when set). Options from Lists → Operational. Success → loadAll(); status save closes panel.

Saved odo
N/A
WO snapshot bar — mirrors R&M aside KV; hidden until a unit is selected. renderMaintAsideWoSummary() → #maintAsideWoSummary + this bar: selectedUnit, WO #, cost, location (hidden without unit).
Print header strip — unit line is textContent only; banner unhides when the form mounts. syncMaintWorkOrderHeader() removes hidden from #maintWoBanner and sets #maintWoBannerUnit textContent to the selected unit, or a “Select an asset…” prompt when none; also retargets vendor / WO field labels and placeholders by #repairLocationTypeInput (internal vs external / parts / other). Called from unit selection, repair location, chips, and related form hooks; pairs with renderMaintAsideWoSummary().
Work order

Service field: catalog + history + presets.

Each line posts to QuickBooks from that row’s account or item. Lock invoice total only if you set the header total manually and do not want lines to retotal it.
Record type
Service type
Service date
Odometer
Suggested miles line under odometer — updates when the unit or Samsara snapshot changes. updateServiceMileageHint(v, rec) sets #serviceMileageHint innerHTML (escaped source + bold miles) when a numeric odometer exists; otherwise textContent for the manual-entry prompt. fillServiceMileageFromSamsara() and renderSelectedUnit() call it with resolvedServiceMileageRecommendation() metadata.
Fleet mileage (ERP)
Planned work (optional)
Free-text lines; host resets from template when presets / record type clear the form. resetMaintPlannedServiceRows() clears #maintPlannedServicesHost, then addMaintPlannedServiceRow() clones #maintPlannedServiceTpl. collectMaintPlannedServiceLines() reads .maint-planned-desc for save.
Vendor
Load #
TMS suggestion or PDF unit note — line under the field clears when you type a load #. applyLoadNumberSuggestion() sets #recordLoadNumberHint textContent from computeSuggestedLoadNumber() (open TMS load for selectedUnit, else delivered / first row) only when the input is empty; clears when no match. applyParsedExpenseInvoicePdf(..., 'maint') may set textContent for PDF unit vs current unit. resetMaintenanceWorkOrderFormFields() clears the host.
Shop location
Choose a type above, then enter where work happened (required). The datalist suggests prior labels. Location detail is saved with the record (yard, vendor site, bay, shop name, or short notes). setRepairLocationCode() keeps the dropdown, hidden type, and this field in sync. fillStaticMaintDatalists() fills #repairLocationOptions for suggestions.
Location detail *
Repair status
Vendor invoice #
Internal WO #
Invoice total
Compares category + item line sums to invoice total; uses innerHTML when ✓/✗ markup is shown. updateMaintCostTotalMatchUi(lineSum, hasLineMoney) drives #maintCostTotalMatch: empty textContent when no line money; prompt when total missing; innerHTML with green ✓ or red ✗ when #costInput is within $0.02 of sumMaintCostLineAmounts(). Called from recalcMaintCostTotalFromLines(). Cleared in resetMaintCostLines() / fillMaintCostLinesFromRecord().
Reserved coordination strip under invoice total — host stays hidden while logic is stubbed. updateMaintInvoiceCostCoordination(lines, rounded, hasAmt) runs from recalcMaintCostTotalFromLines(); currently sets #maintInvoiceCostSummary display:none and clears innerHTML every pass (placeholder for future linked-txn / split guidance).
Catalog admin
Feedback for Add on new catalog names — all textContent on the host below. addCatalogServiceType() sets #maintCatalogServiceHint textContent for validation (Enter a name first.), success after POST /api/maintenance/service-types, or caught errors; clears at start. resetMaintenanceWorkOrderFormFields() clears on new form.
Cost breakdown
New lines
Category vs Item grids (QuickBooks-style). Use + Add … line per grid. This toggle is the default for single “add line” shortcuts elsewhere.
Category details 0
# Category Description Amount Billable Customer Class Position Part # Line memo
Item details (product / service) 0
# Product / service SKU Description Qty Rate Amount Billable Customer Class Position Part # Line memo
Category lines: $0.00 Item lines: $0.00 Total: $0.00
Live reminder under the totals bar when cost lines carry dollars — copy is textContent only. recalcMaintCostTotalFromLines() sets #maintCostLinesSubtotal textContent to the “Totals update live…” line when any line has amount; clears when empty. Also cleared in resetMaintCostLines() / fillMaintCostLinesFromRecord().
Imports & uploads (maint history, AP, fuel) — Upload center
QuickBooks — posting header
Txn type: QuickBooks Expense vs Bill; doc # follows posting. Vendor + line accounts stay on the form above.
Txn type
Pay from account (QuickBooks)
Attachments
Stored with the ERP record; uploaded to QuickBooks when you post.

    Notes
    Parse status for maintenance PDF import — uses Parse PDF to lines / parseMaintRecordInvoicePdf(). parseMaintRecordInvoicePdf() sets #maintInvoicePdfStatus textContent (“Choose a PDF first.”, “Reading PDF…”, success line with hints, or cleared on error toast). applyParsedExpenseInvoicePdf(..., 'maint') mutates the form. resetMaintenanceWorkOrderFormFields() clears the status.

    Notes 1–5 — each box is one topic. Press Enter for a new line inside that note (the number does not change).

    Additional services on same invoice (optional)

    First tire uses the fields above; add more wheel positions for the same vendor invoice / total below. Extra rows share one vendor invoice + one QBO expense/bill header. + Add another tire adds wheel positions on that invoice.

    Extra wheel positions render in the box below — each row is a template clone, not typed into the first-tire fields. addTireExtraLine() clones #tireExtraLineTpl → #tireExtraLinesHost (.tire-extra-pos from TIRE_POSITION_CHOICES). clearTireExtraLines() on reset. collectTireLineItems() merges #tireExtraLinesHost .tire-extra-row with primary tire for save/PDF.
    At fault

    Accident visit: add part/labor lines under Cost breakdown; the service fields above stay the summary label for the visit. Still an accident record. Add part/labor under Cost breakdown — catalog datalist, optional multi-position, per-line QBO account/item. Top Service fields stay the visit label (default Accident Report); line text is what prints.

    Save/post status (left) and edit-mode line (right) — both use plain textContent only. #maintSaveHint: maintToneSaveHint() sets textContent + optional maint-save-hint--caution|error classes — driven from saveRecordWithAction() / maintSaveFromSplitMenu() (busy strings, success, validation), maintPreparePrintWorkOrderOnly() draft PDF messages, and cleared on new form. #maintEditRecordHint: updateMaintEditRecordHint() when __editingMaintRecordId is set from hydrateMaintenanceRecordForm(); cleared in clearMaintenanceEditMode().
    R&M Status — integrity · fuel · parts
    Same signal family as Tracking → Shop. Flags odd repair cadence, large invoices, short tire life, diesel vs miles. Filter severity + search.
    Search
    Window (days)
    Severity
    Refresh alerts after window changes or stale results. Uses in-memory maint records. Open tab after full load or press Refresh alerts; set Window (days) first when you change lookback.
    Stack updates on Refresh alerts, window, search, or severity — same API family as Tracking shop integrity. loadSecurityCatalogUi() → GET /api/maintenance/security-alerts (#maintIntegrityDays). renderSecurityAlerts(..., maintSecurityAlertRenderOpts) → #maintSecurityAlertsBody (header + cards + optional driver-risk). Errors align with Tracking integrity messaging.
    Loading…
    Vehicles by shop / location context ERP shop queues by type + recent WOs by repair location type. Status from queue rows or QBO sync on the WO.

    Queue + repair-location snapshot for shop and roadside units.

    Built from shopQueueCache + recent erp.records — open tab after a full maint Refresh if stale. renderMaintLocationBoard(): internal/external/roadside/parts from shopQueueCache, then visits by repairLocationType from erp.records → #maintLocationBoardHost. Runs when Shop / location is active after loadAll() / queue saves / tab switch.
    Loading…
    Maintenance Table
    Fleet WO grid (service, status, mileage, vendor, QBO). Pick unit in Units; Find unit + chips narrow rows. Pager at bottom.
    Tags ▾

    Find unit + column sort narrow rows.

    Attributes ▾

    Service, status, mileage from maint records + Samsara when linked.

    Fleet type ▾

    Fleet by type shortcuts focus trucks, vans, flatbeds, etc.

    Service status ▾

    Status + QBO columns follow each saved WO row.

    Past due ▾

    Compare Next due with KPI strip for PM.

    Paged dashboard WOs for active Fleet by type + Filter by service. renderMaintenanceTable(): dashboard filtered by vehiclesByCategory()[activeAssetCategory] + #maintenanceServiceFilter → paged #maintenanceTableBody. maintDashboardTablePager + erpPagerRender on #maintTablePagerHost; category/service change → page 1. Repair updates the latest saved ERP row for that unit + service (same API as Shop / location).
    Unit Service Status Actual Mileage Fuel Last Date Next Due Date Next Due Mileage Vendor Inv # WO # Load # Cost Repair QB Sync
    Unit History
    History for selected unit. Click row to edit; New work order blanks the form on same unit.
    Cards rebuild when unit or erp.records changes. renderUnitHistory(): erp.records for selectedUnit, serviceDate desc → #unitHistory cards (service, QB, costs/tires, actions). Empty → No records yet. From renderSelectedUnit() / loadAll().
    No records yet.
    Fleet mix snapshot Tracked Samsara assets by type. Assets = grid; Map = GPS; Shop & maintenance = queues — not this KPI strip.

    Maintenance & shop
    Live internal / external / roadside queues — status vs est., delay reasons; expense rollups by fleet below.
    PDF
    Shop tabs & queues Tabs = queue type — Parts = vendor POs; Roadside ≠ external repair; OOS from maint records. Est. hours → overdue tint; past est needs delay reason. Vehicle map · Safety / HOS

    From
    To
    Status
    Internal shop table re-renders on filter / date / status changes and after queue saves — from shopQueueCache (see ?). renderShopQueues() → filter shopQueueCache (internal) + toolbar → paged #shopInternalTableBody + pager. Cache: GET /api/maintenance/shop-queue on loadAll() + after saves.
    Unit Job Vendor Est (h) Queued Started Finished Status
    Work orders (same shop type, for reference)
    Search

    To

    Unit Job Vendor Est (h) Queued Started Finished Status
    Work orders (external)
    Search
    From
    To
    Status
    Roadside — roadside rows; same cache + filters as other shop tabs. renderShopQueues() → roadside + toolbar → paged #shopRoadsideTableBody + pager. Same cache as other shop tabs.
    Unit Job Vendor Est (h) Queued Started Finished Status
    Work orders (road / OTR)

    Parts queue uses the same Queued / In progress / Completed stages as other shop tabs. Vendor parts: Queued = waiting on supplier · In progress = partial / in transit · Completed = received / closed.

    Search
    From
    To
    Status
    Parts purchase — same renderer; columns use PO / supplier wording. renderShopQueues() → shopType === "parts" + toolbar → paged #shopPartsTableBody + #shopPartsPagerHost. Same shop-queue cache refresh as other tabs.
    Unit Order / description Supplier Est (h) Ordered Active Done Stage
    Work orders (repair location: parts purchase)
    Out of service units
    The list below is built from saved work orders whose service type reads as out of service — not live telematics flags. renderShopQueues(): from erp.records, service types matching out-of-service / oos → one card per unit (latest). Header + = new OOS WO. Fleet roster: Lists & catalogs or unit Active / Retired.
    Maintenance reports
    Shop CSV exports here — full rollups / QBO cross-checks in sidebar Reports (maint spend, detail, sync).
    Exports and rollups. Choose truck / van / flatbed category under Create work order when logging service.
    Integrity · fuel · parts alerts
    Same heuristics as R&M Status — repair frequency, large invoices, tire interval, fuel vs miles. Use with PM + shop context — not alone.
    Frequency, invoice spikes, tire cycles, fuel vs miles — cross-check Operational status + dates; not sole truth.
    Search
    Window (days)
    Severity
    Refresh alerts after window change or if stale — same feed as Maintenance → R&M Status. GET /api/maintenance/security-alerts (toolbar days) → renderSecurityAlerts on #securityAlertsBody + #maintSecurityAlertsBody (same as R&M Status). Filters: integritySearch / integritySeverity. Errors show in the box below.
    Loading alerts…
    Units
    Map list only — filter, pick a row to center map + detail. Not Maintenance → Units (WO picker).
    Cards refresh on filter / pager — pick one to drive the map + detail under it. renderTrackingBoard(): sort/filter vehicles (#trackingSearch) → paged #trackingList. Click → selectTrackingVehicle → map, #trackingDetailBox, #trackingSummaryText.
    Live map (Samsara GPS)
    Samsara positions — pan/zoom freely; pick a unit on the left to highlight and show driver / last ping below.
    Selected unit under the map — updates with renderTrackingBoard() (filter, pager, click). #trackingDetailBox from selectedTrackingVehicle in vehicles (MMY, VIN, category, mileage, fuel, engine, coords) or Select a vehicle.
    Select a vehicle.
    All tracked assets
    Names / VIN / GPS from Samsara (read-only) — edit in Samsara Cloud. TMS + Postgres when DATABASE_URL is set; align unit codes (e.g. T160).
    Tags ▾

    Use the filter box to narrow units in the grid.

    Attributes ▾

    Columns blend Samsara telemetry with ERP mileage where linked.

    Paged vehicles + search — columns mix Samsara telemetry with ERP where linked. renderTrackingAssetsTable(): sorted vehicles + #trackingAssetFilter → paged #trackingAssetsTableBody; new filter → page **1**. Read-only — edit fleet in Samsara Cloud.
    UnitCategoryMileageFuelEngineGPS
    Drivers (Samsara HOS) Same HOS feed as Safety → HOS. Edit drivers in Samsara Cloud; read-only here. Settlement can still use TMS/Postgres when wired.
    Tags ▾

    Duty filter limits which Samsara rows show.

    Attributes ▾

    Drive-left uses the same clock math as Safety.

    board.hos + Duty filter — same window as Safety → HOS. renderTrackingDrivers(): board.hos → applySafetyHosDutyMode (#trackingDriversDutyFilter) → paged #trackingDriversBody + trackingDriversPager / erpPagerRender. Read-only.
    DriverDutyVehicleDrive left
    Yard & idle (T120–T178)
    Default idle band T120–T178. Refresh: Samsara GPS/HOS + optional TMS idle fields. Geofence / env vars → lower ?.
    Yard & idle snapshot Default yard fence (Mines Rd, Laredo). Override YARD_LAT / YARD_LON / YARD_RADIUS_M. Columns: GPS, yard in/out, HOS, optional TMS “since last load”, IDLE_EST_DAILY_REVENUE hint.
    Refresh or open tab loads the idle-band slice (Samsara + optional TMS). GET /api/tracking/idle-snapshot → idleSnapshotPager (_rows), #idleSnapshotMeta, paged #idleSnapshotBody via renderIdleSnapshotTableBody() + #idleSnapshotPagerHost. Errors → one tbody row.
    Unit Idle band In yard Dist m Engine Driver HOS TMS Days since done Est $ risk
    Open tab or press Refresh.
    Summary
    Tracking-only counts (assets, drivers, map). Refreshes with tracking tabs — not Home → System Summary.
    In-memory vehicles + board — same refresh cadence as Map. renderTrackingBoard() → #trackingSummaryText: five counts — vehicles, board.vehicles, board.live, board.assignments, board.hos lengths (line breaks in markup).
    No tracking data loaded yet.
    Accounting board KPIs = expenses, bills, sync alerts, review queue. Cards open the matching tab; Connections = live Samsara / QBO / API.

    Record & open Pick a row to open the same composer or tab as + New — one list, uniform buttons.
    QuickBooks
    Up to three sync error titles when the payload has alerts. paintAcctDashQboErrors() → #acctDashQboErrList. View all errors → sync alert bar.
    Tools & data
    Connections Samsara: — · QuickBooks: — · API health: —
    Cross-WO/AP posting checks before QBO — warning line is plain textContent (first 8 issues). runPostingPreflight() scans erp.workOrders and erp.apTransactions for money rows missing vendor / QBO item or account; sets #maintPostingPreflight textContent with a truncated list, display:block, or hides and clears when clean. Called from loadAll() after QBO status + sync alerts (same refresh tick as connection strip paint).

    Expense

    QBO-style header: one vendor, many lines. Reuse load / invoice # for trip P&L. Save here, then post from the saved list. Posting: save in ERP first → Record to QuickBooks → Verify in QuickBooks.
    Amount
    $0.00
    Type
    Vendor (QuickBooks)
    Unit / asset (QBO Class = unit name)
    Service type / description
    Payment method
    Pay from bank account (QuickBooks)
    Payment terms (QuickBooks — bills)
    Txn date
    Load / invoice #
    Vendor invoice #
    Shop / internal WO #
    Due
    Repair / vendor invoice PDF
    Parse status for Accounting AP PDF extract — same parser as maintenance, different applyParsedExpenseInvoicePdf target. parseApInvoicePdf() sets #apInvoicePdfStatus textContent (“Choose a PDF first.”, “Reading PDF…”, success line with hints, or cleared on error toast). applyParsedExpenseInvoicePdf(p, 'ap') mutates the AP composer. User note: needs selectable text in the PDF; image-only scans usually fail.
    Fills invoice #, date, unit, first-line total when possible. Needs selectable text; scans without OCR usually fail.
    Category & item lines Category vs Item grids (QBO-style). + Add … per section. Amounts sum to the doc total.
    Category details 0
    # Category Description Amount Billable Customer Class Position Part # Line memo
    Item details (product / service) 0
    # Product / service SKU Description Qty Unit $ Total Billable Customer Class Position Part # Line memo
    Total lines: 0
    Memo
    Attachments Files are stored on the server with this work order. When you Post to QuickBooks, they are uploaded and linked to the Purchase or Bill in QBO.
    Multiple files ok — saved with the ERP work order before QBO post.

      Saved Maintenance Expense Transactions
      Saved maintenance AP cards → full form. Exports: WO + AP CSVs.
      No transactions yet.
      Pay bills (QuickBooks)
      Driver payees only
      Pays open QBO Bills via Bill Payment from the bank/card you pick (reconciliation feed). Load from QuickBooks is live — filter with search or Bill Id + Load bill by Id. Shop work: post a Bill from Maintenance expenses first; ad-hoc Purchase cards differ in QBO.
      Search live bills (QuickBooks)
       
      Bill Id only
       
      Vendor (QuickBooks)
      Pay from account
      Account (QuickBooks)
      Payment date
      Check # (optional)
      Memo (private note in QBO)
      Vendor filter optional · one vendor per payment · partial pay edits Remaining on blur Blank vendor → up to 150 open bills. One payment = one vendor (checked rows must match). Partial pay: edit Pay; Remaining / Status follow (capped at open balance on blur).
      Search open bills
      Min open $
      Live QuickBooks rows when connected. Stale? Sidebar Refresh data. Vendor, search, min $, bill-id narrow the load.
      Draft payment total: $0.00 Sums Pay for checked bills across the full loaded set (all pages). Caps at open balance on blur. Rules: hint row ? above.
      Grid resets on QBO load, filters, or pager — draft total stays in sync. loadAccountingOpenBills() → bpMountOpenBillsInTable() → bpRenderOpenBillsPage() → #bpOpenBillsBody (bpHtmlForOpenBillRows), __bpOpenBillsSelection, pager #bpOpenBillsPagerHost / erpPagerRender. bpApplyOpenBillsFilter() resets page.
      Pay Vendor Doc # QBO Bill Id Txn date Due Open balance Pay amount Remaining Status
      Load open bills to see rows.
      Requires ERP write secret or admin (Settings).
      Recent bill payments (this app)
      ERP log of Bill Payment posts from Pay bills (not full QBO audit). Filter + export for recon; body ? for date presets vs export scope.
      Local log when you post above · date filters apply to export Written on each bill payment post. Filter by payment date (blank = newest). Export CSV uses the same filters.
      From
      To
      Search
      Vendor (optional)
      Max rows
       
       
      Open this tab and refresh.
      Rows rebuild on filter/pager changes; status line shows counts. renderBpBillPaymentLogTable() → bpRenderBillPaymentLogPage() → #bpLogBody (bpHtmlForBillPaymentLogRow) + #bpLogPagerHost / erpPagerRender when filtered list > page size.
      Txn date Vendor Pay from Type QBO payment id Total Bills paid Recorded by
      —
      Fuel expenses (dispatcher fast entry)
      One row = one QBO Purchase. Default expense category lines (Diesel / DEF / Reefer → your accounts) with Class = truck. Uncheck Post as expense category line for QBO items (gal × rate). Vendor + optional driver/customer. Autosaves when ERP write secret is set.

      Fuel bill / expense (manual)

      Same pattern as Maintenance expense: vendor header (payment, pay-from, expense #) + product lines. Confirm & record to QuickBooks posts each line as a Purchase in one step; Save to fuel ledger first if you prefer posting from the grid.
      Lines total
      $0.00
      Type
      Vendor (QuickBooks)
      Unit / asset (QBO Class = unit name)
      Payment method
      Pay from bank account (QuickBooks)
      Optional: QBO class & location
      QuickBooks class
      Location / site
      Txn date
      Load / invoice #
      Vendor invoice #
      Shop / internal WO #
      Expense # (QBO DocNumber)
      Cost lines (same shape as maintenance) Category (expense account) or Item (QBO product + gal × $/gal). Catalog or free text. Lock line $ to back-calc gallons from a fixed total.
      New lines Default for new manual fuel rows. Existing rows keep their own line type selector.
      Description QBO item / account Qty (gal) Unit $ Line $
      Memo (QuickBooks private note)
      Shared header; each line = one ledger row. Extra lines append -L2, -L3… to DocNumber when an expense # is set. Payment method + pay-from stored per row for posting.
      From
      To
      Search
      Pay from account (QuickBooks)
      Fuel expense category override (optional)
      Default QBO customer on line (optional)
      Checked (default): expense accounts for Diesel / DEF / Reefer. Unchecked: QBO item lines (gallons × rate).
      Relay / Love’s fuel file (CSV or Excel)
      Preview Love’s / Relay All Transactions (CSV/Excel). Needs ERP write secret. Confirm import loads the grid; each Record to QuickBooks posts one Purchase. Unit, gallons, totals, vendor, dates (4/15/26 → ISO). Category mode maps accounts. Already in QuickBooks = staging only.
      Import preview ERP append only. Each Record to QuickBooks = one Purchase (not batched). Default category mode maps Relay paths to expense accounts.
      Open this tab and refresh.
      Date Expense # Payment method Pay from Unit QB class (unit) QB vendor QB item / account Qty (gal) $/unit Line $ Driver Driver QB vendor Line customer Product Location Status
      —
      QuickBooks Live Master Create vendors here — syncs immediately. Accounts and items: usually add in QuickBooks Online, then Refresh Live QuickBooks Master. Payroll employees live in QBO — refresh after changes.
      In-memory QBO cache line. Updates after Refresh Live QuickBooks Master and the creates above. Last refresh = catalog pull; classes / bank accounts = counts used elsewhere. Each column shows first 50 matches (search narrows).
      Create Vendor Directly in QuickBooks

      Vendors from here; accounts, items, payroll usually in QBO — title ?.

      After QBO changes, click Refresh Live QuickBooks Master.

      Create Product / Service (QuickBooks)
      Posts Product & service to QBO. Income account required by API; expense account optional for purchases. Service vs Non-inventory = how you buy/sell. Status = validation, progress, QBO id.
      Create Account / Category (QuickBooks)
      New chart-of-accounts row (type + optional sub-type). Complex trees: build in QBO first, then Refresh Live QuickBooks Master. Status = validation, progress, errors, new id.
      QuickBooks Vendors
      0
      QuickBooks Items
      0
      QuickBooks Accounts
      0
      Vendors
      Vendors from cache after Refresh Live QuickBooks Master. Create new in the form above; search narrows this column.
      Cards follow vendor search; title ? for QBO workflow. renderQboMaster() → cacheVendors() + #qboVendorFilter, first 50 → #qboVendorList (.record-card or empty message).
      Items
      QBO Products & services — add most in QBO, then refresh master.
      Cards follow item search; title ? for QBO edits. renderQboMaster() → cacheItems() + #qboItemFilter, first 50 → #qboItemList (.record-card or empty message).
      Accounts
      Chart of accounts for expense mapping — new categories usually in QBO first, then refresh.
      Cards follow account filter; title ? for mapping. renderQboMaster() → cacheAccounts() + #qboAccountFilter, first 50 → #qboAccountList (.record-card or empty message).
      Expense history log
      One grid: AP, WO lines, unit records, Relay staging, bill payments (see intro ? below). Export filtered CSV = all matching rows, not only this page.
      Combined expense history Maintenance AP, WO lines, unit records (cost lines), Relay staging, bill payments from this app. Filter by date + source. QBO columns = posting status where applicable; Relay rows use import flags when already in QBO.
      From date
      To date
      Source
      Search (doc, vendor, unit, memo)
      Use Check QBO on posted rows to verify Purchase/Bill still exists. For posted AP, WO, and unit rows, Check QBO confirms Purchase/Bill still exists. Not for bill payments or Relay staging.
      Counts/totals = data loaded for this tab. Stale after imports or QBO changes? Open Accounting → Expense history + sidebar Refresh data.
      Rows rebuild on filter/search/pager; summary stays in sync. renderExpenseHistory() → buildExpenseHistoryRows() → filterExpenseHistoryRows() → #expHistSummary, page slice → #expHistBody, #expHistPagerHost / erpPagerRender. expHistSearchDebounce() re-runs after typing pauses.
      Date Source Doc / ref # Type Vendor Unit Category (QB) Item / line Qty Amount QBO sync QBO ref Posted ERP id Notes Check QBO
      Loading…
      QuickBooks rollback & import safety Revert in QBO deletes Purchase/Bill in QBO and clears posting flags here. Undo spreadsheet import drops ERP import rows only — not QBO. Already posted? Revert in QBO first to stay aligned.
      Refresh loads posted rows, bulk revert list, import tables. Revert vs undo — panel title ?. loadErpImportBatchesUi() scans erp.workOrders, erp.apTransactions, erp.records, erp.fuelPurchases for qboPosted* hits → #erpRollbackPostedSection (none note or checkbox list, first 80) + revertQboPostedBatchClient().

      Click Refresh to load posted QuickBooks rows and batch lists.

      ERP import batches (maintenance & AP files)
      Spreadsheet upload batches. Undo spreadsheet import = ERP-only by batch id — QBO unchanged until you revert posted rows there.
      Batch table updates on Refresh — subhead ? for undo vs QBO revert. loadErpImportBatchesUi() → GET /api/erp/import-batches → #erpImportBatchesBody (error / empty / reverse-chron table) + Undo import → undoErpImportBatch when active.
      —
      Fuel / Relay import batches
      Fuel / Relay CSV staging. Undo clears ERP staging; if posted to QBO, Revert in QBO those rows first.
      Fuel / Relay staging batches — same Refresh as ERP batches above. Same load: #fuelImportBatchesBody clears on fetch error; else empty-state → Fuel Board or fuelImportBatches table + Undo import → undoFuelImportBatchFromMaint.
      —
      Reports Sidebar or tile hub opens a report; search filters link labels in both. Per-tab Refresh / QBO actions sit in each report body — this row is navigation only.
      Yellow roadmap strip below appears when + New custom report or Scheduled reports is used; opening Reports from the rail clears it. repReportsRoadmapMsg(kind) sets #repRoadmapBanner textContent (stub copy for custom vs scheduled), removes hidden, and scrolls into view. openSection('reports', …) clears textContent and hides the banner again.
      Standard ▼
      Maintenance ▼
      Accounting ▶
      Operations ▶
      Standard
      Maintenance
      Accounting
      Operations
      Executive overview Connect QuickBooks for live bills/invoices. Refresh reports rebuilds metrics from cached ERP+QBO; Sync QuickBooks lists + activity reloads catalog + recent QBO window first.
      Metric cards below are replaced on each Refresh reports — this note stays fixed. loadReportsData() → GET /api/reports/summary → reportsSummaryCache; renderReportsAll() → #repOverviewBody (QBO hints + ERP/QBO metric grids). Errors → short <p> only.

      Run Refresh reports — title ? for QBO + snapshot behavior.

      TMS load pipeline Loads/trips from TMS / Postgres when configured; revenue uses revenue_amount. Still empty after setup → Refresh reports on Overview.
      Pipeline counts below replace after Refresh reports on the overview — Postgres TMS only. renderReportsAll() → reportsSummaryCache.tms → #repTmsBody: not-configured note, error string, or summary + status×count table (tms.byStatus).
      Revenue vs rolled-up costs for one load #. Merges WO, AP, and unit maintenance on the same load/invoice #; TMS (Postgres) trip header/stops under the rollup when present. Keeps heavy P&L out of Accounting entry screens.
      Trip cost rollup (load # = invoice #)
      Same load / invoice # rolls WO + AP + maint into one trip. Run lookup fills the grid; Download CSV exports. TMS block when Postgres has the load.
      Load / invoice #
       
       
      Headline + PDFs refresh on Run lookup; TMS card + cost lines fill in the same pass. runSettlementLookup() → GET /api/settlement/by-load/<load> → #settlementSummary (totals, revenue/net, PDF/QBO); #settlementTmsBox (trip/miles or hidden); #settlementLinesBody (paged or empty).
      Enter a load number and run lookup.
      Source Description Unit Amount QB
      No rows.
      Driver pay settlements Per QBO driver vendor: revenue, rolled-up expenses (same rules as trip lookup), net. Optional server DRIVER_SETTLEMENT_PAY_PCT (0–1) → suggested % of linehaul.
      Vendor blocks + load tables refresh on Refresh driver settlements; this line stays during load/errors. loadDriverPaySettlements() → loading innerHTML on #driverPaySettlementsBox, then renderDriverPaySettlementsBox() (per-vendor tables + optional driverPaySettPager_* or empty/error). Pagers re-call renderDriverPaySettlementsBox() for the slice.
      Use Refresh driver settlements — title ? for fields.
      Loads with recorded costs (index)
      Loads with maint / AP / unit-record costs already. View → same # in Trip cost rollup for lines or CSV.
      Index rows refresh on Refresh index; Load / invoice # autocomplete comes from the same response (this page’s datalist). loadSettlementIndex() → GET /api/settlement/index → paged rows in #settlementIndexBody (WO/AP/rec counts, total, View+PDF) or empty/error; rebuilds #settlementLoadHints (≤100 <option>s for #settlementLoadInput list).
      Load / doc # WOs AP Rec Total $
      Use Refresh index above.
      Maintenance spend by unit (ERP records) Server rollup of saved maintenance expense by unit (same universe as Maintenance Table). Download CSV for export.
      Download CSV
      Table or empty state below replaces after Refresh reports on Overview — pager row above appears when the unit list spans pages. renderRepMaintSpendByUnitTable() replaces #repMaintBody innerHTML with either a short empty-state note or a scroll-wrapped table built from reportsSummaryCache.maintenanceCostByUnit for the current page. erpPagerRender fills #repMaintByUnitPagerHost when the slice needs paging.
      Maintenance detailed report (records + cost breakdown) Each maint record + full cost breakdown. Position-based parts (tires, batteries, …) add position + part reference columns.

      Filters + search below — ? explains columns.

      Unit
      From
      To
      Record type
      Search
      Open this report to load.
      Record cards below rebuild when filters change or the pager moves — the status line above shows the filtered count. renderMaintDetailedReport() filters erp.records by unit / dates / type / search, updates #repMaintDetailStatus textContent, then replaces #repMaintDetailBody innerHTML with paged card markup (or a no-rows line). erpPagerRender on #repMaintDetailPagerHost re-calls with keepPagerPage when only the slice changes.
      —
      QuickBooks — bills, purchases, credits, invoices Recent QuickBooks bills, purchases, vendor credits, invoices after Refresh reports (same snapshot window as accounting board). Read-only tables here.
      Transaction tables below rebuild from the same reports snapshot as the overview. renderReportsAll() → reportsSummaryCache.qboCache.transactionActivity → #repQboBody: connect/sync hint or window meta + Σ $ chips + four reportTxnTableHtml blocks (bills / purchases / vendor credits / invoices).
      Local ERP vs QuickBooks posting ERP maint / expense rows vs QuickBooks posted state — drift, dupes, misses. Stale table → Refresh reports.
      Posting mix table below swaps when the reports cache refreshes. renderReportsAll() → reportsSummaryCache.posting → #repSyncBody: intro + table (totals / posted / local-only / errors) for maint records, WOs, AP.
      Team activity & security posture Refresh panel → sign-in posture, checks, (admins) ERP activity. Same APIs as Maintenance → Security alerts where applicable.
      Panel content below reloads only when you press Refresh panel — not part of Refresh reports. loadTeamSecurityPanel() → loading line → GET /api/security/posture → #repTeamBody (or error). Admins: extra activity blocks. Auth off → single explanatory paragraph.

      Loading…

      IFTA, fuel tax & DOT compliance (roadmap) IFTA needs auditable miles-by-state + fuel-by-jurisdiction — usually Samsara ELD/GPS + QBO fuel coding; settlement views already roll revenue/maint/AP.

      Roadmap: persist Samsara vehicleId on trucks/trailers; nightly miles-by-state; fuel import; quarterly export; driver profile ↔ drivers.qbo_vendor_id.

      Today: Fuel planner, fleet/HOS, Accounting → Settlement + driver pay, QBO sync. Schema updates: npm run db:migrate (see 011_fleet_driver_compliance.sql).

      Roadmap — see title ? for scope and what ships today.

      Lists & catalogs Service types, QuickBooks, Vendors & drivers, Operational status, Fleet & Samsara — same sidebar hub as the rest of Maintenance.
      Sidebar or tabs below.
      Stored in Postgres when DATABASE_URL is set. Postgres maintenance_service_catalog when DATABASE_URL is set; WO pickers refresh after edits.
      Add service type +
      POST /api/maintenance/service-types (same as WO form). Needs DATABASE_URL + admin / server write policy.
      Loads on open or R&M Status refresh; search + pager. GET /api/maintenance/service-catalog-admin → renderServiceCatalogAdmin → #serviceCatalogAdminBody. Requires Postgres catalog; adds → POST …/service-types. Sidebar Refresh data reloads pickers.
      Not loaded yet.
      QBO vendors/items/accounts — Refresh QuickBooks lists, then pick on WO/AP. QBO cache — refresh here, then pick on bills/maint lines. Driver ↔ vendor links: Vendors & drivers.
      Refresh QuickBooks lists after QBO edits or stale pickers (same as top bar / Accounting). refreshQboMaster() → GET /api/qbo/master → erp.qboCache + pickers; also Live Master + home when open. Does not post bills — Accounting → QuickBooks live master. Toasts on failure.
      New QuickBooks vendor
      Same as Accounting → Live Master. Display name required; Refresh QuickBooks lists if pickers lag. Status = validation / progress / QBO id.
      QBO vendors + driver payees — refresh lists after QBO vendor changes (top bar or this tab). QBO vendors + TMS drivers as payees in one grid. After QBO adds vendors, Refresh QuickBooks lists.
      Brief Loading…, then payees, QBO search, cached lists. GET /api/maintenance/vendor-catalog — QBO vendors + TMS payees + link UI. Needs QBO; driver search = read-only Samsara. Errors? Refresh QuickBooks lists or fix the connection strip.
      Not loaded yet.
      Operational status picker codes/labels — defaults included; add yard-specific rows. Values on the maintenance board. Defaults ship with the ERP; add rows (yard hold, wash bay, …).
      Load on open; add below, then sidebar Refresh data if pickers look stale. GET /api/maintenance/operational-status-catalog → value/label rows. + Add status to ERP POSTs here; sidebar Refresh data reloads pickers.
      Not loaded yet.
      New operational code +
      Samsara assets/GPS — POST renames need write token + admin or ERP write secret. POST renames here with write token + admin or ERP write secret; otherwise edit in Samsara Cloud.
      POST via this ERP (write-capable token); toasts + list refresh may follow. pushSamsaraVehicleName / pushSamsaraDriverName → POST …/samsara/vehicle|driver/<id> JSON {"name"} + auth + erpWriteHeaders() when required. Success → loadAll(); errors show server text.
      Rename vehicle in Samsara Samsara vehicle id (API/board). Needs write-scoped token — re-issue after scope changes or expect 403.

      Samsara vehicle id + new name, then POST.

      Rename driver in Samsara Samsara driver id (API/HOS/Cloud). Same write-token rules as vehicle — re-issue after scope changes or expect 403.

      Samsara driver id + new name, then POST.

      Upload center
      Pick a tab; upload CSV/Excel where supported. Fuel/Relay: confirm under Accounting before QBO.
      Bank CSV import Matching runs in the banking app (Bank CSV matching). This tab opens that workspace; any standard bank CSV works.

      CSV-only in the banking app.

      Samsara write scopes (advanced)
      Renames need write scopes — Lists → Fleet & Samsara. Without write scopes, renames stay read-only. After scope changes, re-issue the token — otherwise Samsara returns 403.
      Fuel / DEF import Import previews Comdata, Relay, or manual fuel. Use carrier All Transactions (or similar) CSV/Excel. Post from Accounting → Fuel & DEF before QBO.
